c.tlua(7,14): error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; } | { m: string; b: number; }'.
  Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; }'.
c.tlua(8,3): error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; } | { m: string; b: number; }'.
  Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; }'.


==== a.tlua (0 errors) ====
    V = {};
    V.m = "s";
    local va: string = V.m;
    
==== b.tlua (0 errors) ====
    V = { b = 2 };
    local vm: string = V.m;
    local vb: number = V.b;
    
==== c.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // Hover-visible union: records V's union type in the .types baseline.
    local v = V;
    local cm: string = V.m;
    
    // `b` exists in only one arm's constructor. Read here on the un-narrowed
    // union to record whether a direct read is an error or union-with-nil.
    local cb = V.b;
                 ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; } | { m: string; b: number; }'.
!!! error TS2339:   Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; }'.
    V.b = 3;
      ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; } | { m: string; b: number; }'.
!!! error TS2339:   Property 'b' does not exist on type '{ m: string; }'.
